name: Pendo
description: Pendo is commonly used to support customer success workflows, reviews, and handoffs.
whyUseIt: Use Pendo when the team needs more structure, visibility, or speed in customer success work.
founderWorkflow: Use Pendo to keep customer success work visible enough for fast reviews and cleaner delegation.
beginnerMistakes: Adding Pendo before the process around it is defined.
Using the tool as a reporting surface instead of a decision surface.
